Uses of Class
algatorgraph.DEdge

    • Uses of DEdge in algatorgraph

      Methods in algatorgraph that return DEdge 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      DEdge<V,​W> DGraph.addEdge​(V sourceVertex, V targetVertex)
      Adds an edge connecting the specified source and target vertices, creating and returning a new edge.
      DEdge<V,​W> DGraph.getEdge​(V sourceVertex, V targetVertex)
      Returns the edge connecting the specified source and target vertices.
      DEdge<V,​W> DGraph.removeEdge​(V sourceVertex, V targetVertex)
      Removes the edge connecting the specified source and target vertices.
      Methods in algatorgraph that return types with arguments of type DEdge 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.util.Set<DEdge<V,​W>> DGraph.edgeSet()
      Returns the set of all edges in the graph.
      java.util.Set<DEdge<V,​W>> DGraph.edgesOf​(V vertex)
      Returns the set of edges connected to the specified vertex.
      java.util.Set<DEdge<V,​W>> DGraph.getAllEdges​(V sourceVertex, V targetVertex)
      Returns all edges connecting the specified source and target vertices.
      java.util.function.Supplier<DEdge<V,​W>> DGraph.getEdgeSupplier()
      Not implemented.
      java.util.Set<DEdge<V,​W>> DGraph.incomingEdgesOf​(V vertex)
      Returns the set of edges incoming to the specified vertex.
      java.util.Set<DEdge<V,​W>> DGraph.outgoingEdgesOf​(V vertex)
      Returns the set of edges outgoing from the specified vertex.
      java.util.Set<DEdge<V,​W>> DGraph.removeAllEdges​(V sourceVertex, V targetVertex)
      Removes all edges connecting the specified source and target vertices.
      Methods in algatorgraph with parameters of type DEdge 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      boolean DGraph.addEdge​(V sourceVertex, V targetVertex, DEdge<V,​W> edge)
      Adds the specified edge to the graph, connecting the specified source and target vertices.
      boolean DGraph.containsEdge​(DEdge<V,​W> edge)
      Checks if the graph contains the specified edge.
      V DGraph.getEdgeSource​(DEdge<V,​W> edge)
      Returns the source vertex of the specified edge.
      V DGraph.getEdgeTarget​(DEdge<V,​W> edge)
      Returns the target vertex of the specified edge.
      double DGraph.getEdgeWeight​(DEdge<V,​W> edge)
      Returns the weight of the specified edge.
      boolean DGraph.removeEdge​(DEdge<V,​W> edge)
      Removes the specified edge from the graph.
      void DGraph.setEdgeWeight​(DEdge<V,​W> edge, double weight)
      Sets the weight of the specified edge to the given double value.
      void DGraph.setEdgeWeight​(DEdge<V,​W> edge, W weight)
      Sets edge weight
      Method parameters in algatorgraph with type arguments of type DEdge 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      boolean DGraph.removeAllEdges​(java.util.Collection<? extends DEdge<V,​W>> edges)
      Removes all specified edges from the graph.
